compiled_state.title: Update brainstorm SKILL.md Phase 1 to load and apply scale-inference prompt
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE (RED test assertion created by Task 651c-652f; this task makes the test_brainstorm_phase1_references_scale_inference assertion pass — all assertions in test-scale-inference-shared-prompt.sh go GREEN)

## What to Change
In `plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md`, in Phase 1 (Socratic Dialogue or Context Loading), before any ticket content processing:

### 1. Add Read instruction with hard error
```
Read `plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/scale-inference.md`. If the file cannot be read, STOP and emit:
"ERROR: scale-inference.md not found at plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/scale-inference.md — create this file before running brainstorm."
```

### 2. Add scale-inference trigger condition
Apply the scale inference protocol (from scale-inference.md) when the feature description implies a volume-sensitive decision. Trigger examples: processing records, serving traffic, querying a data store, handling concurrent users, storing user-generated content, running background jobs.

When triggered, run the 3-step protocol: artifacts first → domain web search → ask user only if no usable estimate found.

Record the result as the session's **scale context** (numeric estimate, "small scale", or "not applicable").

### 3. Add scale_context to planning-intelligence log
Add `scale_context` field to the planning-intelligence log entry. Values: a numeric estimate, "small scale (default)", "not applicable (no volume decision)", or "user-provided: <value>".

## What NOT to Change
- Phase 2 content (handled by Task 5b)
- The approval gate (Step 4) and its four options
- The planning-intelligence log field names that existed before this epic

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md` contains a Read instruction for `shared/prompts/scale-inference.md`
  Verify: `grep -q "shared/prompts/scale-inference.md" plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md`
- [ ] File contains hard-stop error emission for missing scale-inference.md
  Verify: `grep -q "scale-inference.md" plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md && grep -qi "ERROR\|cannot be read\|not found" plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md`
- [ ] File documents the scale-inference trigger condition
  Verify: `grep -qi "volume.sensitive\|scale.*trigger\|scale inference" plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md`
- [ ] All sections of `tests/skills/test-scale-inference-shared-prompt.sh` pass (test goes GREEN)
  Verify: `bash tests/skills/test-scale-inference-shared-prompt.sh`
- [ ] Existing brainstorm tests still pass
  Verify: `bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-approval-gate.sh && bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-scenario-analysis.sh && bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-type-gate.sh`
- [ ] `plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci` passes
  Verify: `plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci`

comments.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): Document the error behavior choice for scale-inference prompt loading. Add AC: the implementation must specify whether a missing scale-inference.md causes a hard error (abort Phase 1) or graceful degradation (skip scale check, log warning). The chosen behavior must be documented in a comment in the SKILL.md change itself.
comments.author: Test
